report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Crypto Tax-Loss Harvesting Guide 2026 covering IRS wash sale rules, TLH strategies, cost basis tracking, 1099-DA reporting, and tax software tools; and Cold Storage & Seed Phrase Security Guide 2026 covering hardware wallet comparisons (Ledger, Trezor, Coldcard, Foundation Passport, Keystone), seed phrase backup strategies, multi-sig setups, and self-custody best practices.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Crypto tax-loss harvesting: As of 2026, the IRS wash sale rule does NOT apply to cryptocurrency (treated as property, not securities), allowing immediate rebuy after selling at a loss — a major advantage over stocks

Starting 2026, Form 1099-DA requires exchanges to report crypto transactions including Box 1i (Wash Sales Loss Disallowed), signaling IRS infrastructure readiness for future wash sale enforcement on crypto

Capital losses can offset gains dollar-for-dollar plus up to $3,000/year against ordinary income, with unlimited carryforward — short-term losses are more valuable as they offset higher-taxed short-term gains (up to 37%)

Hardware wallet cold storage remains the gold standard for crypto security in 2026: Ledger and Trezor dominate consumer market, Coldcard and Foundation Passport lead for Bitcoin-only air-gapped security
CC EAL5+/EAL6+ secure element chips provide tamper-resistant key storage; clear signing features now standard to combat blind-signing attacks
Metal seed phrase backup plates (Cryptosteel, Billfodl) recommended over paper for disaster resistance; Shamir's Secret Sharing enables distributed backup across multiple locations

sections.title: Content Created
items: Crypto Tax-Loss Harvesting Guide 2026 — comprehensive learn guide covering TLH fundamentals, crypto-specific wash sale exemption, step-by-step strategy walkthrough, short-term vs long-term loss optimization, tax software comparison (Koinly, CoinLedger, TokenTax, CoinTracker), common mistakes, and regulatory outlook. Includes 6 FAQs, tax disclaimer, and 6+ internal links.

Cold Storage & Seed Phrase Security Guide 2026 — comprehensive learn guide covering hot vs cold wallet security, hardware wallet technical architecture, 2026 hardware wallet comparison table (Ledger Nano X/Stax, Trezor Model T/Safe 5, Coldcard Mk4, Foundation Passport, Keystone Pro), seed phrase backup strategies, multi-sig and BIP39 passphrase advanced security, common mistakes, and device recovery procedures. Includes 6 FAQs, security warning callout, and 6+ internal links.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Tax-Loss Harvesting guide: title 'Crypto Tax-Loss Harvesting Guide 2026 — IRS Rules & Strategy | degen0x', target keywords: crypto tax-loss harvesting, wash sale rule crypto, tax loss harvesting strategy, IRS crypto taxes, 1099-DA crypto, Form 8949

Cold Storage guide: title 'Cold Storage & Seed Phrase Security Guide 2026: Hardware Wallets & Self-Custody Best Practices', target keywords: cold storage crypto, hardware wallet security, seed phrase backup, self-custody, Ledger vs Trezor, recovery phrase safety
Both pages include Article + FAQ structured data schemas (JSON-LD) for rich snippet eligibility, OpenGraph article metadata with publishedTime, Twitter card metadata
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts, internal links to /tools/tax-calculator, /tools/pnl-calculator, /wallets, /compare/wallets/ledger-vs-trezor, and related learn guides
